programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice

programme.title: Shrek

programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Halloween Kills
programme.desc: Survivors of Michael Myer's first rampage decide to take matters into their own hands, forming a vigilante mob that sets out to hunt Michael down, once and for all.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: The Forever Purge
programme.desc: The Purge reaches a boiling point as the violence spills over into a never-ending onslaught, and a Hispanic couple flee south to Mexico with the aid of a white rancher family.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Two energy drink salesmen play the role of big brothers to fulfil a community service obligation, which quickly becomes a pint-sized hassle as they learn kids can be unpredictable.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Holmes and Watson
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: After trying hard to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad, Brad's plans turn upside down when the biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The worst team in the renegade American Basketball Association is on the brink of collapse, but can it rebound to salvation?

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Buddy, a human raised as an elf, is sent to the US in search of his true identity after nearly bringing Santa's operation to a catastrophic standstill due to his size.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: A goofy pet detective is hired to track down Snowflake, the Miami Dolphins' mascot.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest - and grossest - sequel. Jim finally proposes to Michelle, but nothing goes smoothly in this finale which will keep die-hard Pie eaters coming back.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have found the perfect place to settle down and share a future: the bottom half of a beautiful old duplex. Their new home comes with an unexpected fixture.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: A twist of fate sends a down-and-out tennis player with a ranking of 119 off to Wimbledon for his last chance of winning the men's singles title and the heart of the star 'bad girl' of tennis.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two anonymous emailers fall head-over-laptops in love, unaware they are fierce rivals in the bookshop business.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached - until he meets Lucy.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have found the perfect place to settle down and share a future: the bottom half of a beautiful old duplex. Their new home comes with an unexpected fixture.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Life Without Dick
programme.desc: After Colleen accidentally kills her boyfriend Dick, mafia hit-man Daniel offers to take credit for the murder.

programme.title: This Is Where I Leave You
programme.desc: When their father dies, four grown siblings, bruised and banged up by their respective adult lives, are forced to return to their childhood home and live under the same roof together for a week.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Two best friends coming out of disastrous relationships, decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact. However, soon they begin to fall in love and must re-evaluate their feelings for each other.

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When a bride dumps her timid husband on their honeymoon, a chance encounter with a wild, free-spirited woman makes him lighten up on life.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Jarhead
programme.desc: Follows Marine Swoff from a sobering stint in boot camp to active duty in the Middle East.

programme.title: Sound of Metal
programme.desc: When ex-addict Ruben unexpectedly loses his hearing his life is thrown into turmoil. In a group home for Deaf addicts, he must choose between his new community and the life of sound he left behind.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A creative writing assignment yields complex results between a teacher and his talented student.

programme.title: Last Night In Soho
programme.desc: Edgar Wright's psychological thriller follows a young woman mysteriously able to enter the glamorous 1960s, where the dreams of the past splinter into something darker.

programme.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Fuelled by a suitcase full of mind-bending pharmaceuticals, Duke and Gonzo set off on a fast and furious ride through nonstop neon, surreal surroundings, and a crew of the craziest characters.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: One man will rise above his challenges and prove that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: Jarhead
programme.desc: Follows Marine Swoff from a sobering stint in boot camp to active duty in the Middle East.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Everybody's Fine
programme.desc: A retired widower who has planned his first family get-together since his wife's death and is disappointed when his adult children all cancel on him, decides to pay a surprise visit.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women, bred for intelligence and obedience, embark on an expedition to colonise a distant planet.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: Harvard undergrad and computer genius Mark Zuckerberg's global social network heralded a revolution in communications, but his success leads to personal and legal complications.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Following a mystery treasure map into a spectacular underground world, the Goonies fight a developer out to flatten their homes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Four private school misfits form a coven to summon the dark forces they need to wreak havoc on their persecutors, but they learn that everything comes with a price.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Matt and Christina Drayton are a couple whose attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiance who is black.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Her Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A young woman's dad becomes the obsession of her seductive roommate, who will stop at nothing to possess him.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa
programme.desc: UK. Two rebellious teenage dreamers see their friendship shatter as nuclear terror grips the world in the Cuban missile crisis.

programme.title: Ali & Ava
programme.desc: Ali and Ava, both lonely for different reasons, meet and sparks fly. A connection grows, despite the legacy of Ava's past relationship, and Ali's turmoil at the breakdown of his marriage.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: Elstree 1976
programme.desc: Actors and extras reminisce about their time on the set of Star Wars (1977) and how making the film affected their lives.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: Farming
programme.desc: A young Nigerian boy is sent to be raised by a white British family in the hopes of a better future, and instead becomes the leader of a white skinhead gang.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: A documentary exploring the infamous theft of street artist Banksy's sculpture, The Drinker, and the ensuing battle with the art terrorist: AK47.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: A troubled, volatile 15-year-old girl's mum brings a mysterious stranger into their home. It promises to change everything, but life isn't always that simple.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his life.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: Inn of the Damned
programme.desc: A sheriff investigates why the guests at a local hostelry check in, but never check out.

programme.title: Heartbreak High

programme.desc: Years after meeting a jazzman in Australia, an outback trumpeter goes to Paris and meets him again.

programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest - and grossest - sequel. Jim finally proposes to Michelle, but nothing goes smoothly in this finale which will keep die-hard Pie eaters coming back.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: When a cowardly farmer meets the woman of his dreams, things go south after he realises she is married to a notorious gunslinger.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite working stiffs get back to business and wreak havoc in the workplace.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After doing time for insider trading, an entrepreneur wastes no time in devising a winner-take-all plan to rebuild her empire.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Life Without Dick
programme.desc: After Colleen accidentally kills her boyfriend Dick, mafia hit-man Daniel offers to take credit for the murder.

programme.title: This Is Where I Leave You
programme.desc: When their father dies, four grown siblings, bruised and banged up by their respective adult lives, are forced to return to their childhood home and live under the same roof together for a week.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Two best friends coming out of disastrous relationships, decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact. However, soon they begin to fall in love and must re-evaluate their feelings for each other.

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When a bride dumps her timid husband on their honeymoon, a chance encounter with a wild, free-spirited woman makes him lighten up on life.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A hopelessly single TV producer is in for a rude awakening when a chauvinistic shock jock takes over as host of her poorly rating show.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: When a smooth-talking bachelor invents an imaginary son in order to meet attractive single mums, he gets a hilarious lesson about life from bright, but hopelessly geeky 12-year-old named Marcus.

programme.title: Honey: Rise Up And Dance
programme.desc: An aspiring and determined street dancer comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, and joins a dance competition to win the prize of a college scholarship.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd, a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Everybody's Fine
programme.desc: A retired widower who has planned his first family get-together since his wife's death and is disappointed when his adult children all cancel on him, decides to pay a surprise visit.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women, bred for intelligence and obedience, embark on an expedition to colonise a distant planet.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: Harvard undergrad and computer genius Mark Zuckerberg's global social network heralded a revolution in communications, but his success leads to personal and legal complications.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: Honey Boy
programme.desc: From a screenplay by Shia LaBeouf, based on his own experiences, brings to life a young actor's stormy childhood and early adult years as he struggles to reconcile with his father.

programme.title: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A fixer for Capitol Pictures in Hollywood deals with a pregnant starlet, gossip columnists, and a kidnapped movie star, even as he considers an attractive job offer, all in a single day.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: The story of Australia's most famous outlaw, whose time on the run with his gang ended in the legendary shootout at Glenrowan.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: In South Boston, the state police force are waging an all-out war to take down the city's top organised crime ring.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Four private school misfits form a coven to summon the dark forces they need to wreak havoc on their persecutors, but they learn that everything comes with a price.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Matt and Christina Drayton are a couple whose attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiance who is black.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Retired Old West gunslinger William Munny reluctantly takes on one last job, with the help of his old partner and a young man.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their rivals.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: Farming
programme.desc: A young Nigerian boy is sent to be raised by a white British family in the hopes of a better future, and instead becomes the leader of a white skinhead gang.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: An assassin with a peerless reputation for lethal efficiency finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: A dazed and bloodied woman emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, but she must return to help find her missing friends and face the terror lurking there.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s intent on keeping up their hedonistic lifestyle. That is, until Laura falls in love with Jim and begins to question all of her choices.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: A woman committed to a mental hospital for much of her life must rely on her diary to recount her memories to a doctor who is reassessing her for the move to a new facility.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.title: Versus: The Life & Films of Ken Loach
programme.desc: Ken Loach reflects on his 50-year career in socially aware dramas and documentaries, sharing successes, controversies, and personal challenges with insights from friends and family.

programme.title: The Fringe Dwellers
programme.desc: Story of an aboriginal family who tries to move out of the fringe into the main white community.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Southgate's affair with Danielle's mother causes problems; Deloraine wants Matt to return.

programme.title: Angel Baby
programme.desc: Harry, a schizophrenic patient, meets Kate at a psychiatric clinic, and they begin a passionate affair. Believing their love will heal them, they stop their medicines, but their world unravels.

programme.title: Sons of Steel
programme.desc: When Aussie heavy metal singer and peace activist Black Alice finds himself in a dystopian future, he must go back in time to save the world from a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Walkabout to Hollywood
programme.desc: Exploring an Australian Aboriginal man's work to bridge the gap between his life as a film and television actor to his native cultural roots.

programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: Police believe small-time crook Wally Mellish has his wife and child as hostages, as he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: Love and Other Catastrophes
programme.desc: Mia and her friends struggle to find love, romance and a new roommate.

programme.title: The Adventures of Barry McKenzie
programme.desc: After he comes into a small inheritance, Barry McKenzie sets off for England with his aunt, Edna Everage to advance his cultural education.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: The comic adventures of the kids who live on Circe Island, a fishing community off the coast of Western Australia.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Southgate's affair with Danielle's mother causes problems; Deloraine wants Matt to return.

programme.title: Blackfellas
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man struggles between loyalty to his people and his desire to break free from a cycle of self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: The Fringe Dwellers
programme.desc: Story of an aboriginal family who tries to move out of the fringe into the main white community.

programme.title: Frog Dreaming
programme.desc: Living with his guardian in an outback township, Cody learns of an ancient Aboriginal myth, sparking an interest that will not let him rest.

programme.title: Dead-End Drive In
programme.desc: In a dystopian future Australia, a health enthusiast and his girlfriend are trapped in a drive-in cinema turned concentration camp for delinquent youths and refugees.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: The comic adventures of the kids who live on Circe Island, a fishing community off the coast of Western Australia.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Her mother's fiance makes sexual advances toward Lucy; Yola is pregnant.

programme.title: Black and White
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man is wrongly accused of murder and his patchwork defence team changes the course of legal history in this powerful real life drama.

programme.title: Manganinnie
programme.desc: Manganinnie, a Tasmanian Aboriginal woman, searches for her tribe with the company of a lost girl named Joanna.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Retired Old West gunslinger William Munny reluctantly takes on one last job, with the help of his old partner and a young man.

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: A single mother searches for a suitable man to become the father of her precocious baby.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: With his CIA days behind him, Jack Ryan is on vacation when he foils an assassination attempt on the royal family. An enraged IRA splinter faction targets him and his family in revenge.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: Two drugged-out bike riders and a spaced-out lawyer go on an odyssey in search of the real America only to find violence and bigotry.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling best friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed that could break her family apart and put everyone in danger.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Harry and Meghan: Escaping the Palace
programme.desc: The couple decide to step back from the duties of the British monarchy following the birth of their son Archie.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: Versus: The Life & Films of Ken Loach
programme.desc: Ken Loach reflects on his 50-year career in socially aware dramas and documentaries, sharing successes, controversies, and personal challenges with insights from friends and family.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: A dazed and bloodied woman emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, but she must return to help find her missing friends and face the terror lurking there.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s intent on keeping up their hedonistic lifestyle. That is, until Laura falls in love with Jim and begins to question all of her choices.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, this is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it.

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler, marooned at sea, struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary following the life of Irish drag queen Panti Bliss, in the lead up to the historic referendum on marriage equality for same-sex couples in Ireland.

programme.title: Nowhere Special
programme.desc: A single father dedicates the last few months of his life to finding a new family for his four-year-old son.

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
programme.desc: T'was the night before Christmas, when a zombie apocalypse threatened a sleepy town. Anna and her friends must fight, slash, and sing their way to survival.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: Manganinnie
programme.desc: Manganinnie, a Tasmanian Aboriginal woman, searches for her tribe with the company of a lost girl named Joanna.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Her mother's fiance makes sexual advances toward Lucy; Yola is pregnant.

programme.title: Celia
programme.desc: Celia an independent and imaginative 9-year old living uncomfortably with her buttoned-down family. When her world falls apart, her life veers between fantasy and reality, violence and tragedy.

programme.title: Frog Dreaming
programme.desc: Living with his guardian in an outback township, Cody learns of an ancient Aboriginal myth, sparking an interest that will not let him rest.

programme.title: Dead-End Drive In
programme.desc: In a dystopian future Australia, a health enthusiast and his girlfriend are trapped in a drive-in cinema turned concentration camp for delinquent youths and refugees.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Her mother's fiance makes sexual advances toward Lucy; Yola is pregnant.

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk
programme.desc: Anzacs wage a long and courageous resistance to Nazi invasion during World War II.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Girl Asleep

programme.desc: A look behind the life of the first Indigenous Australian film star, and how he became an iconic actor in Australian cinema.
